zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Neville於1442年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Richard Neville41歲，母親Alice Montagu37歲。她於1458年與William Bonville在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年3月25日在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖享年62歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Neville was born in 1442, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Neville, was 41 and her mother, Alice Montagu, was 37. She married William Bonville in 1458, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 25 March 1504, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Neville est née en 1442, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Neville, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Montagu, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé William Bonville en 1458, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1504, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Neville è nata il nel 1442 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Neville, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice Montagu, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato William Bonville nel 1458, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 marzo 1504, nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Nevilleが1442年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Nevilleは41歳，母Alice Montaguは37歳であった。1458年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでWilliam Bonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年3月25日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチで62歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチにて埋葬された。

ko.Lady Chapel of St. Helen’s Church, Ashby: 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Beheaded in the Tower of London, Middles: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던
ko.Donington Castle, Kirby, Leicestershire,: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 도닝턴 비 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Neville(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Neville(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Montagu(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 William Bonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 3월 25일 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Neville nasceu em 1442, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Neville, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montagu, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com William Bonville em 1458, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1504, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Lady Chapel of St. Helen’s Church, Ashby: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.Beheaded in the Tower of London, Middles: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Neville родилась в 1442 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Neville было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Montagu, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bonville в 1458 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 марта 1504 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Neville nació en 1442, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Neville, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Montagu, tenía 37 años. Se casó con William Bonville en 1458, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1504, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
